Get instant access to ABS HI121H technical datasheet. It is an acrylonitrile butadiene styrene grade with high stiffness & suitable for injection molding.
ABS HI121H (ABS Grade Plastic): Technical Datasheet Ask our AI expert AION For Suppliers Adhesive ingredients Coating ingredients Cosmetic ingredients Plastics and elastomers Polymer additives Find a product Find a solution Selection resources New product concepts News Contact us Home > Find a product > LG Chem > ABS HI121H Technical datasheet ABS HI121H Supplied by LG Chem - Last Updated on Mar 2, 2019 Description Benefits Applications Compliance Availability Properties ABS HI121H is an acrylonitrile butadiene styrene (ABS) grade with high stiffness. Is suitable for processing through injection molding. Applications include electric and electronic products. Complies with the UL Flame rating HB.
